attributes.content:
## Overview

The Theme Card card gives the workspace a structured home for design theme with color tokens, typography, spacing. Applied to other cards via cardInfo.theme.

As a first-class Boxel card, it can be linked to adjacent records, surfaced in filtered views, and reused in automation without the information collapsing into disconnected notes or one-off documents.

## Core Mechanics

Theme Card usually evolves through drafting, review, and reuse. The card keeps its core content structured enough to be surfaced in different views, linked from related records, and updated by people or automation without losing provenance.

The card can be created directly by a user, produced from a [[Workflow Playbook]], or updated in response to a [[Trigger]]. When AI is involved, a [[Prompt Template]] or [[Skill Card]] can shape how it is drafted, summarized, classified, or routed.

## Integration Points

- **[[AI Image]]** -- Theme Card can incorporate generated visuals or treat image output as a linked asset.
- **[[Prompt Template]]** -- Prompt-driven drafting or summarization can turn Theme Card into a reusable AI-assisted workflow.
- **[[Project]]** -- Theme Card can be grouped under a larger initiative so its work stays visible in context.
- **[[Task]]** -- Theme Card often creates follow-up work or is itself tracked through task execution.
- **[[Document]]** -- Theme Card can link to longer-form supporting content when a lightweight card needs deeper context.
- **[[Brand Guide]]** -- Brand Guide can provide adjacent context, downstream output, or grouped navigation around Theme Card.

## Example Use Cases

- **System of record:** Teams create Theme Card as the structured home for design theme with color tokens, typography, spacing. Applied to other cards via cardInfo.theme and keep related work linked instead of scattered across notes.
- **Automation handoff:** A [[Workflow Playbook]] or [[Trigger]] creates or updates Theme Card when upstream conditions are met, reducing repetitive setup work.
- **Search and reporting:** Theme Card stays queryable for dashboards, summaries, and downstream actions without re-entering the same information in multiple places.

cardInfo.name: Theme Card
cardInfo.summary: Design theme with color tokens, typography, spacing. Applied to other cards via cardInfo.theme.
